shots.vo: hero — the menu bar plate plays the waltz
shots.prompt: The floating menu-bar plate, front and center: the REAL captured piano strip playing the glockenspiel waltz, note-particles puffing up. 'your menu bar is a synthesizer · type · click · send MIDI'.

shots.vo: About window drops in, languages cycle
shots.prompt: The real About window drops in from the middle and cycles six localizations (EN ES 中文 日本 RU DA).

shots.vo: the fullscreen keymap — raster scope + big piano + QWERTY map
shots.prompt: The REAL fullscreen keymap view slides up: lit raster scope, big piano, QWERTY map, instrument family colors cycling piano→guitar→violin→trumpet→flute. 'and it goes fullscreen'.

shots.vo: end card — QR to menuband.app, on the Mac App Store
shots.prompt: End card: About window + the REAL scannable QR to menuband.app, 'on the Mac App Store'.

title: Menu Band — launch promo reel sections
